meta.note: Week 1 — Foundation. Focus on hitting protein targets and establishing meal timing before optimizing anything else.

monday.label: Monday

exercises.name: Full OrangeTheory Class
exercises.cue: Heart rate zone training. Push during all-out intervals — this is your primary fat-burn session.

exercises.name: Focus: Treadmill Sprints
exercises.cue: Max effort on all-out pushes. Recover fully during base paces.

exercises.name: Focus: Rower Intervals
exercises.cue: Drive with legs first, then hinge back, then pull arms. Full power on each stroke.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 3 eggs scrambled with spinach, bell pepper, garlic
1 cup plain 0% Greek yogurt with blueberries + 1 tsp honey
Coffee — eat first, not on empty stomach

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Quinoa + romaine + cucumber + shredded carrots + feta
Olive oil & herb dressing (parsley, dill, garlic)

monday.recovery: Ice sore areas + full stretch routine

exercises.name: Outdoor Hill Run
exercises.cue: Easy-moderate pace with natural hill variation. Aerobic base building.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.cue: Chest up, knees tracking over toes. Increase weight weekly.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.cue: Hinge at hips, soft knee bend, flat back. Feel hamstrings loading.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.cue: Squeeze shoulder blades at end of pull. Corrects hospital posture.

exercises.name: Dead Bug (core)
exercises.cue: Low back stays pressed to floor. Extend opposite arm/leg slowly.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: ½ cup rolled oats cooked in water or almond milk

wednesday.label: Wednesday

exercises.name: Warm-Up: 4 × 50 yds
exercises.cue: Easy freestyle. Long strokes, exhale fully underwater. 15 sec rest.

exercises.name: Kick Set: 4 × 25 yds
exercises.cue: Kickboard flutter kick. Engages core and legs. 20 sec rest.

exercises.name: Main Set 1: 4 × 100 yds
exercises.cue: Freestyle at moderate effort. Consistent splits. 20 sec rest.

exercises.name: Main Set 2: 2 × 150 yds
exercises.cue: Steady freestyle. Add backstroke for shoulder relief. 30 sec rest.

exercises.name: Pull Set: 4 × 50 yds
exercises.cue: Pull buoy between thighs. Upper body isolation. 15 sec rest.

exercises.name: Cool-Down: 4 × 25 yds
exercises.cue: Very easy freestyle or backstroke. Focus on breath.

exercises.name: Float Rest
exercises.cue: Float on your back. Zero effort. Cortisol reset — do not skip this.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: ½ cup Greek yogurt with raspberries + drizzle of honey

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Plain Greek yogurt + celery + Dijon + fresh dill

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: 1 small piece of your favorite sweet

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: ¼ cup brown rice or cauliflower rice

wednesday.recovery: 5-min float rest after swim + leg drainage if shift was long

thursday.label: Thursday

exercises.name: Full OrangeTheory Class
exercises.cue: Second OTF of the week. Push harder than Monday if energy allows.

exercises.name: Treadmill Intervals
exercises.cue: Progressive overload applies to cardio too. Beat Monday's effort.

exercises.name: Floor Work
exercises.cue: Focus on form over speed. Floor work is your strength component today.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 1 scoop protein powder + 1 cup almond milk
½ frozen banana + 1 tbsp almond butter
½ cup spinach + 1 tbsp ground flaxseed
Ginger tea instead of extra coffee

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Diced cucumber + shredded purple cabbage + edamame

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 5 oz ground turkey cooked with garlic + ginger

thursday.recovery: Ice + stretch + Epsom salt bath if available

friday.label: Friday

exercises.name: Outdoor Run
exercises.cue: Add 3–4 × 30-second hill sprints or Fartlek intervals. Metabolic spike day.

exercises.name: Hill Sprint × 4
exercises.cue: All-out effort up the hill. Walk back down fully for recovery.

exercises.name: Cool-Down Walk
exercises.cue: Gradual heart rate lowering. Keep moving — don't stop abruptly.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: Top with fresh berries + 1 tsp maple syrup

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Mixed greens + chickpeas + cucumber + shredded carrots
Sunflower seeds + olive oil + fresh parsley

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: ½ cup plain Greek yogurt spread on parchment

meals.name: Dinner
meals.note: Red meat is a mild reflux risk — keep portion moderate and eat early
ingredients: Bok choy + snap peas + bell pepper + garlic

friday.recovery: Heat on tight areas (day 2) + stretch routine

saturday.label: Saturday

exercises.name: OrangeTheory Class
exercises.cue: Full class. Biggest training day of the week.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.cue: Hip-width stance, sit back not forward, depth to parallel or below.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.cue: Step long, 90-degree knee angle. Torso upright.

exercises.name: Leg Press Machine
exercises.cue: Feet mid-platform, push through heels. Don't lock knees at top.

exercises.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
exercises.cue: Slow eccentric. Protects hamstrings during running.

exercises.name: Calf Raises (weighted)
exercises.cue: Full range of motion. Pause at top.

meals.name: Breakfast
ingredients: 6 egg whites + 2 eggs baked with spinach + bell pepper + feta
½ cup oatmeal with almond milk + 1 tbsp honey + flaxseed

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 5 oz cod with breadcrumbs + parsley + garlic + olive oil
Quinoa salad with cucumber + feta + kalamata olives

saturday.recovery: Full stretch routine + upper body focus

sunday.label: Sunday

exercises.name: Warm-Up: 200 yds easy
exercises.cue: Relaxed freestyle. Shake out the body.

exercises.name: Activation: 4 × 25 yds
exercises.cue: Descending pace — 4th is near-sprint. 20 sec rest.

exercises.name: Sprint Set 1: 8 × 25 yds
exercises.cue: ALL-OUT sprint each 25. This is your treadmill sprint equivalent. 30 sec rest.

exercises.name: Active Recovery: 100 yds
exercises.cue: Very relaxed backstroke. Let heart rate drop completely.

exercises.name: Sprint Set 2: 4 × 50 yds
exercises.cue: 85–90% effort. Maintain form even when tired. 40 sec rest.

exercises.name: Pyramid: 25+50+75+50+25 yds
exercises.cue: Start easy, peak at 75 yds, come back down. 20 sec between.

exercises.name: Cool-Down: 100 yds easy
exercises.cue: Backstroke or slow freestyle. Controlled breathing.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.note: Sit upright for 30 min after eating
ingredients: 2 poached eggs on whole grain toast
¼ avocado + sliced cucumber + fresh dill

meals.name: Lunch
ingredients: Red lentils + spinach + carrots + celery + garlic
1 slice whole grain bread + thin almond butter

meals.name: Sweet Treat
ingredients: Or: one small bakery item with herbal tea

meals.name: Dinner
ingredients: 4 oz chicken thighs marinated in olive oil + garlic + fresh herbs + tiny splash ACV
Fennel tea after dinner for digestion

sunday.recovery: Full lymphatic drainage + stretch + restorative swim/yoga
